Commands  ›   ›  Annotation Preferences Seed Default Arrowheads And Tags

Annotation Preferences Seed Default Arrowheads And Tags

writes to model Public API · not yet exposed

Seeds default arrowheads and tag families per the Annotation Preferences Plan. Walks each known category, attempts to resolve via the three-tier resolver, and downloads from Supabase if absent. Idempotent — safe to re-run.

Before you run this

Active document must be open. Internet access required for Supabase fallback.

After it runs

The standard MEP tag and arrowhead families are loaded into the active document.

When to use this

  • User opens a fresh model and wants every tagging command to "just work" without picking families.
Don't use this when

Loading a single specific family (use AnnotationPreferencesDownloadFamilyFromSupabase directly).

What you'll see in the chat

on start
Seeding standard MEP tag and arrowhead families…
thinking
Checking which annotation families are already loaded…
Downloading missing families from Supabase…
Loading families into the model…
on success
Loaded {LoadedCount} standard annotation families. {SkippedCount} already present.
on failure
Could not seed annotation defaults: {error}

REST API

Not yet exposed

This command does not carry a [RestApi] attribute today. Once tagged, this section will auto-populate with:

  • POST /api/v1/commands/annotation_preferences_seed_default_arrowheads_and_tags
  • Request body schema (from [RestApiParam])
  • Response schema (from [RestApiResponse])
  • curl / JS / Python code examples

Keywords & intent patterns

seed annotations · annotation_preferences_seed_defaults · install standard tags · load default arrowheads
